Robobrain je vybavený manipulačnými pazúrmi, integrovanou laserovou zbraňou a omračovacím zariadením Mesmetron. Jeho biologická mozgová zložka poskytuje výnimočnú taktickú inteligenciu a schopnosť manipulovať so zbraňami štandardnými pre ľudí.
LanguageData.RobCo_Robobrain.label: robobrain
LanguageData.RobCo_RobobrainSyringer.description: Presná injekčná pištoľ, ktorá vystreľuje kovové ihly naplnené toxickými zlúčeninami. Je navrhnutý tak, aby poranil cieľ pri náraze a vydal jed na väčšiu vzdialenosť ako väčšina bočných zbraní.
LanguageData.RobCo_RobobrainSyringer.label: RobCo striekačka
LanguageData.RobCo_BerserkSecuritron.description: Jednotka Securitron, ktorej obmedzovače správania zlyhali, čo ju zanechalo v stave bezohľadnej agresie. Zachováva si plnú bojovú schopnosť Mark II – Gatlingov laser, raketomety a elektrošokové zbrane – ale bez rozpoznávania frakcií, hodnotenia hrozieb alebo deeskalačných protokolov. Útočí na všetky ciele v dosahu bez rozdielu.
LanguageData.RobCo_BerserkSecuritron.label: berserk Securitron
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkI.description: Bezpečnostný robot RobCo Industries PDQ-88b postavený na jedinom ťažkom jednokolesovom podvozku. Mark I nesie v pravom ramene 9 mm samopal a na obrazovke CRT zobrazuje predvojnový policajný dôstojník. Vyznačuje sa telom z titánovej zliatiny a integrovanými systémami autooprav. Jednotky Mark I používajú základný bojový softvér a sú menej efektívne v zložitých úlohách ako vylepšený variant Mark II.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkI.label: Značka Securitron I
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII.description: PDQ-88b Securitron so softvérovým balíkom Mark II, ktorý prináša kompletnú výzbroj zbraní online: laser X-25 Gatling, raketomety M-235 a granátomety G-28. Jeho CRT obrazovka zobrazuje skôr vojaka ako policajta. Mark II bola zamýšľaná bojová sila Roberta House na obranu New Vegas a Mojave.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronMkII.label: Značka Securitron II
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronElectroshock.description: Vylepšená laserová platforma integrovaná do Securitron Mark II s palubnou raketovou batériou.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronElectroshock.label: sekuritrónový policajný laser
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.description: Integrovaný balistický opakovač namontovaný na bezpečnostnej platforme Securitron Mark I.
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.label: sekuritrónový balistický opakovač
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronLaser.tools.0.label: šokový obušok
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotAnnihilator.description: Strážny robot RobCo Industries vyzbrojený trojhlavňovým minigunom a Gatlingovým laserom, navrhnutý na trvalé potlačenie pechoty a ľahko obrnených cieľov. Strážny bot je vyhradená bojová platforma RobCo postavená na jednoduchom syntetickom čipe osobnosti, ktorý obsahuje iba bojové rutiny. Annihilator je štandardným výrobným variantom tejto rady.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotAnnihilator.label: anihilátor sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotDeathbot.description: Strážny robot, ktorý nesie kompletnú sadu zbraní: minigun, raketomet, plameňomet a odpaľovač kazetových granátov. Je to jedna z najviac vyzbrojených autonómnych jednotiek, s ktorými sa v pustatine stretávame. Jeho centrálny procesor obsahuje čip na nanoštruktúru, čo naznačuje, že sa používal ako testovacie prostredie pre pokročilé nanotechnologické programy pred vojnou alebo po nej.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotDeathbot.label: deathbot
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotPestcontrol.description: Variant strážneho robota vybavený priemyselným plameňometným systémom a dobíjateľnou nádržou na palivo pre dlhšie operácie. Pôvodne navrhnutý na likvidáciu škodcov vo veľkom meradle a odmietnutie oblasti, je schopný nepretržitého zápalného ohňa v širokej oblasti. Variant Pestcontrol bol predávaný poľnohospodárskym a vládnym klientom pred vojnou.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotPestcontrol.label: strážca proti škodcom
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotSiegebreaker.description: Variant strážneho robota nakonfigurovaný na útok na opevnenie a protipancierové operácie. Jeho primárnym zbraňovým systémom je stojan s vysokovýkonnými raketometmi vhodnými na demoláciu vystužených konštrukcií. Jazdí na rázvore kolies mecanum, ktorý umožňuje pohyb po väčšine terénu. Štandardné brnenie strážnych botov a bojové protokoly sú zachované.
LanguageData.RobCo_SentrybotSiegebreaker.label: siegebreaker sentrybot
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachine.description: Masívna autonómna bojová platforma kombinujúca palebnú silu ťažkých strážnych robotov s integrovaným mechanoidným nosným systémom na nasadenie dronov Liberator. Vojnový stroj vysiela taktický koordinačný signál, ktorý zvyšuje bojovú účinnosť blízkych jednotiek Liberator. Je vyzbrojený pulznou batériou s viacerými zábleskami a zosilnenými vojnovými rukavicami pre boj na blízko.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachine.label: vojnový stroj
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineMiniNukeLauncher.descrip: Batéria s trvalým pulzom integrovaná do pevných bodov trupu War Machine.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineMiniNukeLauncher.label: pulzná batéria vojnového stroja
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_Electroshock.label: elektrošoková skrutka
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserAssaultron.label: RobCo Laser Assaultron
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserAuto.label: automatický laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserHigh.label: diaľkový laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserLow.label: tlmený laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LaserSheepsquatch.label: RobCo prebitý laser hlavy Assaultron
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LiberatorLaser.label: oslobodzovací laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_LibertyPrimeMiniNuke.label: Liberty Prime mini-nuke
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_ScurrybotLaser.label: scurrybot laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SecuritronLaser.label: sekuritrónový laser
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SentryRocket.label: strážna raketa
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_SonicBark.label: zvuková kôra
LanguageData.RobCo_Bullet_Syringe.label: RobCo injekčná striekačka
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.description: A wood-fueled station for brewing wasteland extracts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench.label: fueled extract lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.descr: An electrically powered station for brewing wasteland extracts.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AlchemicalWorkbench_Electric.label: electric extract lab
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.description: An extract is causing the user to lose memories quickly, shortening both positive and negative memories far faster than normal.
LanguageData.VFEM2_AmnesiaDraught.label: amnesia extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.description: A patched-up practice target mounted on a crude stand. It is kept around as a placeholder range fixture for anyone still trying to train their aim.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ArcheryTarget.label: archery target
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.description: An extract is shutting the user's body down into a deep coma-like state.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ComaDraught.label: coma extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.description: An extract is boosting the user's global work speed while slowing energy loss, but it also raises the risk of a heart attack and leaves them with a major sleep-rate crash afterward.
LanguageData.VFEM2_EfficiencyDraught.label: efficiency extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.description: An extract is artificially increasing the user's fertility. The boost is strong enough to give even infertile people a chance to become parents.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FertilityDraught.label: fertility extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.description: An extract is heightening the user's ability to learn, letting them gain knowledge faster, eat faster, rest quicker, and gain more psyfocus while the potent phase lasts. The effects reverse when it fades.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FocusDraught.label: focus extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.description: An extract is improving this person's natural wound regeneration, letting them recover from injuries significantly faster than normal.
LanguageData.VFEM2_HealingDraught.label: healing extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.description: An extract is improving this person's immune system, making them more capable of fighting off diseases and infections at the cost of making them sleepier.
LanguageData.VFEM2_ImmunizationDraught.label: immunization extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.description: An extract is providing mental clarity, helping the user focus on skills they are passionate about at the cost of diminished combat capability.
LanguageData.VFEM2_InspirationDraught.label: inspiration extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.description: An extract is dulling the user's sense of pain at the cost of greatly reduced focus and productivity.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PainkillerDraught.label: painkiller extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.description: A hardy wasteland vine that yields dark, bloody fruit when harvested. Its juice is prized for rough trade liquor and survival tonics, and the plant can be harvested repeatedly once established.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Plant_Grape.label: bloody vine
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.description: An extract is poisoning the user and rapidly degrading their condition.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PoisonDraught.label: poison extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.description: An extract is hardening the user's skin into a built-in layer of armor that resists burns and physical trauma, though it makes them much less attractive.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StoneskinDraught.label: stoneskin extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.description: An extract is sharpening the user's strength and reflexes, improving combat ability at the cost of higher social fight chance and a higher mental break threshold.
LanguageData.VFEM2_StrengthDraught.label: strength extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.description: An extract is causing severe pain to the user, leaving them unable to move. Prisoners lose resistance quickly, and slaves become fully suppressed.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TorturerDraught.label: torturer extract
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.description: A straw-stuffed practice dummy lashed to a post. It is little more than a placeholder training fixture, but still lets people work on their form without risking a real fight.
LanguageData.VFEM2_TrainingDummy.label: training dummy
LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.description: A barrel for fermenting rot gut.
LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.label: rot gut barrel
LanguageData.ChemBoiler.label: crude oil boiler
LanguageData.Chemlamp.label: oil lamp
LanguageData.ChemlampPost.label: oil lamp post
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.description: A mutated offshoot of ginseng whose roots burrow deep through loose soil until they tap underground oil pockets. Farmers cultivate radseng for the chemfuel-rich sludge in its roots, even though a bad spark can turn the field into an inferno.
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.label: radseng
LanguageData.TableFaro.description: A travel-worn gaming table used for caravan games and roadside wagers. Allows up to two players at a time.
LanguageData.TableFaro.label: caravan table
LanguageData.DeathrestAccelerator.description: A blood pump used to hasten recovery from vitamin deficiency.
LanguageData.DeathrestAccelerator.label: vitaminpump
LanguageData.DeathrestCapacitySerum.description: A serum designed to increase the body's ability to withstand Wendigo sickness.
LanguageData.DeathrestCapacitySerum.label: Wendigo Capacity Serum
LanguageData.DeathrestCasket.description: A containment casket for those suffering from cannibal's vitamin deficiency syndrome known as "The Shakes".
LanguageData.DeathrestCasket.label: the box
LanguageData.GlucosoidPump.description: A blood pump used to create muscle mineral reserves.
LanguageData.GlucosoidPump.label: mineralpump
LanguageData.HemogenAmplifier.description: A blood pump used to increase hemogen absorption.
LanguageData.HemogenAmplifier.label: proteinpump
LanguageData.Hemopump.description: A blood pump used to help with bloodflow and relax muscles.
LanguageData.Hemopump.label: bloodpump
LanguageData.PsychofluidPump.description: A blood pump for stabilizing mental symptoms, relaxing their mind and helping them to focus.
LanguageData.PsychofluidPump.label: chempump
LanguageData.WestTek_BehemothMutagen.description: A brutal FEV-3 mutagenic package that collapses a super mutant subject into a gigantic, tame behemoth war-beast. Only first- and second-generation super mutants survive the process.
LanguageData.WestTek_BehemothMutagen.label: behemoth mutagen
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVCulture.comps.0.inspectString: Can be analyzed by a colonist.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVCulture.description:
A stabilized culture kept alive for higher-order Forced Evolutionary Virus work. Guaranteed transformation results when used in procedures.
A colonist can analyze this culture to unlock FEV-3 research.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVCulture.label: FEV culture
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVProbe.comps.0.inspectString: Can be analyzed by a colonist.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVProbe.description:
A crude pre-refinement sample of Forced Evolutionary Virus growth medium. It is unstable and difficult to handle safely.
A colonist can analyze this probe to unlock FEV-1 research.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVProbe.label: FEV probe
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVSample.comps.0.inspectString: Can be analyzed by a colonist.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVSample.description:
A concentrated viral sample suitable for controlled testing. More stable than raw probe material.
A colonist can analyze this sample to unlock FEV-2 research.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVSample.label: FEV sample
LanguageData.WestTek_IsolatedFEVDosage.description: A highly stabilized Forced Evolutionary Virus dose reserved for colonist-directed procedures. Guaranteed transformation results when used in procedures.
LanguageData.WestTek_IsolatedFEVDosage.label: isolated FEV dosage
LanguageData.WestTek_NightkinMutagen.description: A specialized FEV mutagenic package that stabilizes a Nightkin stealth field in an existing West Tek super mutant. Only first- and second-generation West Tek super mutants can survive the implantation.
LanguageData.WestTek_NightkinMutagen.label: nightkin mutagen
LanguageData.WestTek_RefinedFEVDosage.description: A cleaner Forced Evolutionary Virus dose suitable for more controlled procedures. Lethality is reduced compared to wild samples.
LanguageData.WestTek_RefinedFEVDosage.label: refined FEV dosage
LanguageData.WestTek_UnrefinedFEVDosage.description: An unstable Forced Evolutionary Virus dose. The virus is not yet controlled enough to produce consistent results.
LanguageData.WestTek_UnrefinedFEVDosage.label: unrefined FEV dosage
LanguageData.GR_ArchoGrowthcell.label: archotech growth sac
LanguageData.GR_ElectroWomb.description: A compact incubation tank built to mature unstable West Tek specimens from growth cell to full release.
LanguageData.GR_ElectroWomb.label: incubation tank
LanguageData.GR_GenePod.description: A West Tek growth vat where unstable strain templates are drowned in Forced Evolutionary Virus and coaxed into viable test organisms.
LanguageData.GR_GenePod.label: FEV vat
LanguageData.GR_GeneticExtractionTable.description: A West Tek extraction rig that renders subject tissue into condensed strain samples for later recombination and vat work.
LanguageData.GR_GeneticExtractionTable.label: strain extraction table
LanguageData.GR_GeneticsTinkeringTable.description: An advanced West Tek workbench for compounding boosters, stabilizers, and implant-grade augment parts for mutant research.
LanguageData.GR_GeneticsTinkeringTable.label: augmentation bench
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeAwful.label: strain frame (awful)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeExcellent.label: strain frame (excellent)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeGood.label: strain frame (good)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeLegendary.label: strain frame (legendary)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeMasterwork.label: strain frame (masterwork)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeNormal.description: A stabilized West Tek strain frame used by the FEV vat as the baseline lattice for new experimental growth stock.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeNormal.label: strain frame (normal)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframePoor.label: strain frame (poor)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeUnfinished.label: unfinished strain frame
LanguageData.GR_GrowthCell.description: A portable containment sac holding an unstable FEV embryo until it can be transferred into a West Tek incubation tank.
LanguageData.GR_GrowthCell.label: FEV growth sac
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidGenetic.label: humanoid strain
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidGenetic.label: insectoid strain
LanguageData.GR_LargeElectroWomb.description: A heavy growth tank for larger prototypes and mature mutant stock that would never fit inside a compact incubation chamber.
LanguageData.GR_LargeElectroWomb.label: large incubation tank
LanguageData.GR_TemplateGenetic.label: blank strain template
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboGenetic.label: colossus strain
LanguageData.GR_TissueGrinder.description: A brutal West Tek processing bench that tears specimen tissue down into usable strain templates and recovers viable experimental material from corpses.
LanguageData.GR_TissueGrinder.label: tissue macerator
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_UnityHood.description: A hood worn by followers of the Unity.
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_UnityHood.label: unity hood
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_UnityRobe.description: A ceremonial robe worn by members of the Unity and other FEV cultists.
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_UnityRobe.label: unity robe
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_BruteArmor.description: Heavier scavenged plating intended for large mutant bruisers expected to absorb return fire.
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_BruteArmor.label: brute armor
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_GruntArmor.description: Crude field armor assembled for ordinary super mutant shock troops.
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_GruntArmor.label: grunt armor
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_MasterArmor.description: Command armor reserved for high-value mutant leaders and vat-born enforcers.
LanguageData.WestTek_Apparel_MasterArmor.label: master armor
LanguageData.WestTek_Centaur.description: Centaurs are hostile FEV predators built from failed human stock and finished into hunting beasts. West Tek's field strain keeps the low-slung, many-limbed silhouette but now uses the tougher Wasteland Compendium combat profile instead of the earlier lightweight animal tuning.
LanguageData.WestTek_Centaur.label: centaur
LanguageData.WestTek_Centaur.tools.0.label: tentacle
LanguageData.WestTek_Centaur.tools.1.label: teeth
LanguageData.WestTek_Floater.description: Floaters are fast, flammable FEV horrors that drift on their own gas bladders and crowd prey in packs.
LanguageData.WestTek_Floater.label: floater
LanguageData.WestTek_Floater.tools.0.label: fore mouth
LanguageData.WestTek_Floater.tools.1.label: ovipositor
LanguageData.WestTek_Floater.tools.2.label: head
LanguageData.WestTek_SuperMutantBehemoth.description: An ancient FEV giant restored to West Tek's mutant catalogue.
LanguageData.WestTek_SuperMutantBehemoth.label: super mutant behemoth
LanguageData.WestTek_TameBehemoth.description: A stabilized behemoth strain conditioned to obey West Tek handlers.
LanguageData.WestTek_TameBehemoth.label: tame behemoth
LanguageData.WestTek_TameBehemoth.tools.0.label: left fist
LanguageData.WestTek_TameBehemoth.tools.1.label: right fist
LanguageData.WestTek_TameBehemoth.tools.2.label: head
LanguageData.WestTek_Leather_FEVMutant.label: nodulous skin
LanguageData.WestTek_BehemothFireHydrantClub.descript: An oversized steel pipe with a fire hydrant welded to its end.
LanguageData.WestTek_BehemothFireHydrantClub.label: fire hydrant club
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorCataphract.description: A suit of heavy armor used by Whitespring secret service units to break fortified positions in frontal assaults when no other option is available.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorCataphract.label: secret service armor
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorCataphractPrestige.descript: An ornate heavy armor awarded to high-ranking Whitespring secret service operatives. Embedded cryptex threads enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorCataphractPrestige.label: patriot secret service armor
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetCataphractPrestige.de:
A heavily-armored high-tech helmet, with a solid plasteel-weave shell and indirect visual system for non-frontal view angles. It protects against all but the most powerful or luckily-aimed shots.
Expensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded cryptex threads also enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorHelmetReconPrestige.descrip:
A high-tech armored helmet with a built-in status computer and a protective plasteel-weave plate.
Expensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded cryptex threads also enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorLocust.description: A variant of recon armor with short-range thrust capabilities for quick movement in urban environments. Urban scouts prefer close-quarters engagements and quick strikes rather than static defense.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorLocust.label: urban scout armor
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarineGrenadier.description: A variant of marine armor specialized for cold and arctic operations, fitted with a shoulder-mounted launcher. Arctic marines specialize in breaching cold-climate fortifications.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarineGrenadier.label: arctic marine armor
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarineHelmetPrestige.descri: A marine armor helmet used by Whitespring patriots, with a built-in status computer and layered plasteel-weave plates. Embedded cryptex threads also enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarineHelmetPrestige.label: patriot marine helmet
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarinePrestige.description:
A suit of armor used by Whitespring patriots. Layered plasteel-weave plates are very effective at stopping attacks, with few vulnerable joint sections. Neuro-memetic assistors allow a human to wear the armor and still move easily.
Expensive and ceremonial, patriot marine armor marks membership and rank. Embedded cryptex threads also enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorMarinePrestige.label: patriot marine armor
LanguageData.Apparel_ArmorReconPrestige.description:
A suit of light armor, designed to permit quick movement. Plasteel-weave plates block attacks without compromising mobility, and neuro-memetic assistors in the lower body allow a human to wear the armor and still move easily.
Expensive and beautiful, prestige armor like this is usually made for those of high status. Embedded cryptex threads also enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_Coronet.description: A beret styled with the Whitespring insignia, worn by enclave personnel of certain ranks.
LanguageData.Apparel_Coronet.label: Whitespring Beret
LanguageData.Apparel_Crown.description: A cap worn by senior Whitespring researchers, denoting a leadership role in cryptid studies.
LanguageData.Apparel_Crown.label: Whitespring Scientist Cap
LanguageData.Apparel_EltexSkullcap.description: A tight skullcap designed for cryptid research focus. It provides no physical protection, but its special materials enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity.
LanguageData.Apparel_EltexSkullcap.label: cryptex skullcap
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusHelmet.description: A lightweight helmet designed for cryptid research focus. While it provides little physical protection, its special materials enhance the wearer's cryptid sensitivity and dissipate neural heat.
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusHelmet.label: cryptex helmet
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusRobe.label: cryptex robe
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusShirt.description: A shirt embedded with special cryptid-focusing materials. These enhance cryptid sensitivity and help dissipate neural heat.
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusShirt.label: cryptex shirt
LanguageData.Apparel_PsyfocusVest.label: cryptex vest
LanguageData.Apparel_RobeRoyal.description: A long, formal longcoat used by Whitespring patriots and officers. Embroidered with the enclave sigils, it marks membership and rank.
LanguageData.Apparel_RobeRoyal.label: patriot longcoat
LanguageData.VFED_Aerodrone.description: Vertibot is a spacer-tech, unmanned aerial vehicle equipped with advanced sensors and a missile payload. Designed for autonomous long-range operations, it's commonly used by the Whitespring Enclave for reconnaissance and bombardment. Its ability to release powerful missile salvos makes it effective against various targets. This vertibot is temporarily disabled due to the recharge cycle.
LanguageData.VFED_Aerodrone.label: vertibot
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneBatteryPack.description: A large, overcharged vertibot battery. Will release a strong electromagnetic pulse when damaged, potentially disabling nearby defenses.
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneBatteryPack.label: vertibot battery pack
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.description: A large military crate of vertibot munitions. Will explode when damaged, sending armed shells flying in random directions.
LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.label: vertibot munitions crate
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_InvisibilityEngulfer.descri: A multi-use personal stealthboy cloak device engineered based on experimental Whitespring technology. Allows the user to become completely invisible for a brief duration, after which the device requires a short amount of time to recharge.
LanguageData.VFED_Apparel_InvisibilityEngulfer.label: Stealthboy
LanguageData.VFED_BiosecuredCrate.description: A small Whitespring crate containing extremely valuable items. May contain critical intel. Due to the special restrictions, only senior Whitespring officials are capable of opening it.\n\nAny attempt to destroy it will destroy the items as well.
LanguageData.VFED_BurnoutIntelScraper.description: A Brotherhood expeditionary device capable of intercepting Whitespring communication. When activated, it will begin intel scraping, emitting a pulse in regular intervals. Each pulse has a chance of generating a small amount of intel, but it may also increase your visibility and even alert a Whitespring strike force. After 10 pulses, the machine burns out and triggers a fiery explosion.
LanguageData.VFED_CrashedAerodrone.label: crashed vertibot
LanguageData.VFED_CriticalIntel.description: A dossier containing critical information about the Shattered Whitespring Enclave. In order to protect the information from the Whitespring counterintelligence, the information needs to be stored in a physical form. It can be used to plan high-profile assassination attempts, but it can also be exchanged into standard intel via the contraband system.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterDeclassifier.description: A Brotherhood expeditionary declassifier is a single-use, ultra-tech device consisting of a brain-scan apparatus and a long, thick needle. It is primarily used by Whitespring Brotherhood expeditionaries for data extraction. By inserting the needle into the skull of a senior official, memories can be downloaded from their brain, forming valuable Brotherhood expeditionary intel. The amount of intel received is determined by the rank of the target official. The person affected by a Brotherhood Expeditionary Declassifier dies in the process, and when used on neutral visitors, it is treated as an act of war.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterDeclassifier.label: Brotherhood declassifier
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech vertibird designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system.
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttle.label: Brotherhood vertibird
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttleIncoming.label: Brotherhood vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.VFED_DeserterShuttleLeaving.label: Brotherhood vertibird (leaving)
LanguageData.VFED_Filth_Propaganda.label: Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.description: A chunk of a Whitespring flagship. It seems to have been torn off by some kind of powerful weapon.\n\nHaving landed not long ago, it still contains useful resources which you can acquire by deconstructing it.
LanguageData.VFED_FlagshipChunk.label: Kovac-Muldoon debris
LanguageData.VFED_FuelTank.description: A large fuel tank used to refuel Whitespring vertibirds. Will detonate if damaged beyond a certain point, potentially triggering a chain reaction.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMaxpack.description: The governmental APC is a formidable armored transport truck, known for its impressive cargo capacity. Its armor is impenetrable, ensuring the safety of its contents throughout transit. Once in motion, the APC’s doors remain sealed until it reaches its predetermined destination. While attempting to loot its cargo is futile due to built-in self-destruct protocols, its robust exterior makes it an ideal shield on the battlefield.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMaxpack.label: governmental APC
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMegaHighShield.description: An advanced shielding apparatus, the Whitespring mega high-shield projects a vast momentum repulsor field, allowing shots to exit but preventing any from entering. Specifically calibrated for high angles, it's adept at deflecting incoming mortar rounds, vertibot strikes and even orbital slicer beams. The unit can be temporarily disabled by EMP attacks, either by shocking the projector unit itself, or using EMP munitions on the shield. Draws huge amounts of power.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialMegaHighShield.label: governmental mega high-shield
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialUnderfarm.description: An underground hydroponics bay used by the Whitespring Enclave to feed its personnel. Fully automated and connected to water mains, these farms require no labor to operate.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialUnderfarm.label: Whitespring underfarm
LanguageData.VFED_Intel.description: A dossier containing information about the Shattered Whitespring Enclave. In order to protect the information from the Whitespring counterintelligence, the information needs to be stored in a physical form. It can be used to obtain prewar tech from the Brotherhood expeditionaries, or to gain access to quests and even assassination missions on Whitespring officials.
LanguageData.VFED_PsychicAmplifier.description: Decommissioned Whitespring technology since the invention of psylink neuroformers, psychic amplifier upgrades a psylink in the user's mind. It cannot form a psylink by itself, and can only be used by colonists with already present psylink. The user presses the device over the eyes, where it links to the brain directly and restructures part of it. Afterwards, the device disintegrates into worthless ash.
LanguageData.VFED_PsychicAmplifier.label: cryptid amplifier
LanguageData.VFED_StrikeBuoy.description: A small surveillance buoy usually deployed around temporary convoy stops. Linked directly with a patrolling vertibot, once triggered, it will send down a small missile salvo on its location.
LanguageData.VFED_SupplyCrate.description: A small Whitespring crate containing valuables. May contain intel. Opening it requires bypassing several security protocols and takes a short while.\n\nAny attempt to destroy it will destroy the items as well.
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillanceDisplayBank.description: A Whitespring computer interface. Linked to the surveillance console, the display bank shows live footage from all surveillance pillars in the sector.
LanguageData.VFED_SurveillancePillar.description: A large pillar with a series of sensors, cameras and motion detectors. Thanks to the sophisticated face recognition system, surveillance pillar can detect the presence of Brotherhood expeditionaries in radius and will increase the visibility of whichever faction has sent them. Can be disabled via electromagnetic pulse, or by simply cutting off the power grid.
LanguageData.VFED_TechiteDiscStack.description: A compact stack of data discs produced exclusively by the Whitespring Enclave for knowledge transcription. They are primarily designed for preserving information. When ignited, they release a dense cloud of blinding smoke and sparks, capable of engulfing a wide area in flames.
LanguageData.VFED_TechiteDiscStack.label: data disc stack
LanguageData.VFED_Techprinter.description: The Data Printer is a marvel of technological innovation, designed to capture and preserve the intricate knowledge residing within a scientist’s mind. These advanced machines imprint this invaluable information directly onto data discs. Techprints provide foundational knowledge for researchers, shedding light on innovations from more advanced societies.
LanguageData.VFED_Techprinter.label: data printer
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.label: orbital cannon capacitor bank
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonControlStation.descriptio: This terminal serves as the primary interface for operating the Orbital Cannon batteries. Equipped with sophisticated controls and targeting systems, the Orbital Cannon Control Station ensures precision and coordination when deploying the formidable firepower of the Orbital Cannons. Operators need to be within its radius to control it.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonControlStation.label: orbital cannon control station
LanguageData.VFE_Apparel_StellicRobe.label: Whitespring suite
LanguageData.VFEE_Aperitif.description: A non-alcoholic, pleasantly light, citrusy, and slightly bitter aperitif that owes its flavors and aromas to sweet and bitter oranges, rhubarb, and Whitespring craftsmanship. Its recipe is guarded by Whitespring hospitality offices, and few on the rim have managed to recreate it. Drinking it induces heavy but painless vomiting, completely clearing the stomach and resetting the palate.\n\nWhitespring officials prize aperitif for letting them indulge in even more of the settlement's finest cuisine.
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_AbsolverHelmet.description: A high-tech helmet with a solid plasteel-weave shell and multi-spectrum sensors that feed telemetry data to the wearer. While it provides excellent protection, its primary purpose is concealment through an intricate optical camouflage system backed by real-time firing solutions. Armor like this is reserved for the Whitespring Enclave's elite assassins due to limited production.
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_AbsolverHelmet.label: Whitespring light helmet
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_ArmorAbsolver.description: A high-tech suit of powered armor with layered plasteel-weave plates and multi-spectrum sensors that feed telemetry data to the wearer. While it provides excellent protection, its primary purpose is concealment through an intricate optical camouflage system that also assists the user's movement. Armor like this is reserved for the Whitespring Enclave's elite assassins due to limited production.
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_ArmorAbsolver.label: Whitespring light armor
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_ArmorDeserter.label: Brotherhood expeditionary armor
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_DeserterHelmet.label: Brotherhood expeditionary helmet
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_JanissaryCuirass.label: Whitespring heavy armor
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_JanissaryHelmet.label: Whitespring heavy helmet
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_TechfriarCrown.description: An exceedingly complex facemask fitted with advanced technology reserved for senior Whitespring scientists. It is designed for designated researchers so they can advance the Whitespring Enclave's needs without rest.\n\nThe inlaid techprint synchronizes with the wearer's brain while they perform research, effectively doubling research speed while restoring rest and recreation.
LanguageData.VFEE_Apparel_TechfriarCrown.label: Whitespring scientist helmet
LanguageData.VFEE_GrandChair.label: Whitespring chair
LanguageData.VFEE_GrandRoyalRug.description: A majestic rug with a Whitespring-style pattern, for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEE_GrandRoyalRug.label: grand Whitespring rug
LanguageData.VFEE_GrandTable.label: Whitespring table
LanguageData.VFEE_ImperialBanner.label: Whitespring sign
LanguageData.VFEE_ImperialSlab.description: A stoney bas relief of Whitespring imagery for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEE_ImperialSlab.label: Whitespring slab
LanguageData.VFEE_LargeRoyalRug.description: An intricate rug with a Whitespring-style pattern, for decorating a floor.
LanguageData.VFEE_LargeRoyalRug.label: large Whitespring rug
LanguageData.VFEE_OrbitalSlicer.label: orbital beam
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalMirror.label: Whitespring mirror
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalSculptureGrand.label: grand presidential sculpture
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalSculptureLarge.label: large presidential sculpture
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalSculptureSmall.label: small presidential sculpture
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalStool.label: Whitespring stool
LanguageData.VFEE_SteleSmall.label: presidential plaque
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: An ornate chair used by the President for official addresses and meditation. Sitting in the presidential desk chair can serve as a focus for ceremonial duties and cryptid meditation.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: presidential desk chair
LanguageData.VFEI_ArmoredShuttle.description: A spacer-tech Whitespring gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. Equipped with a twin-linked autocannon for ground support, these XVB02s often land in the middle of the battlefield to extract stranded troops.
LanguageData.VFEI_ArmoredShuttle.label: XVB02
LanguageData.ShipLandingBeacon.label: Vertibird Landing Beacon
A command staff issued to Whitespring executive officers during inspections, briefings, and emergency command duty. Its cryptex head sharpens cryptid insight and helps regulate neural strain, while the embedded attunement core rejects any wielder outside the assigned chain of command.
LanguageData.GrandThrone.description: An ornate grand chair used by the President for official addresses and meditation. Sitting in the presidential grand chair grants the occupant a sense of authority and dignity.
LanguageData.GrandThrone.label: presidential grand chair
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_MonoSwordBladelink.descripti:
A crystal-metallic longsword refined for Whitespring security officers. Its mono-molecular edge cuts through armor with ease, while an embedded cryptex core sharpens the wielder's cryptid insight and stabilizes the weapon's high-speed response.
The cryptex core can attune to only one bearer at a time. Once that bond is established, the blade responds with extreme speed and precision and rejects any wielder outside its assigned handler.
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_MonoSwordBladelink.label: cryptex molecular blade
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_PlasmaSwordBladelink.descrip:
A metal-cored officer's sword wrapped in a sheath of captive plasma. Targets are sliced by the inner edge and burned by the surrounding field, giving Whitespring officers a close-range weapon that can cut and cauterize in the same strike.
Its cryptex guidance core can attune to only one bearer at a time. Once linked, the sword responds with unusual speed and control and rejects any wielder outside its assigned handler.
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_PlasmaSwordBladelink.label: plasma officer sword
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_ZeusHammerBladelink.descript:
A Whitespring warhammer with an embedded EMP capacitor. On impact it discharges a powerful pulse in addition to the physical blow, making it especially effective against power armor, robots, and other advanced hardware.
Its cryptex guidance core can attune to only one bearer at a time. Once linked, the hammer tracks the wielder's timing and strike rhythm with unusual accuracy and rejects any hand outside its assigned operator.
LanguageData.MeleeWeapon_ZeusHammerBladelink.label: pulse hammer
LanguageData.Throne.description: An ornate chair used by the President for official addresses and meditation. Sitting in the presidential chair may be used as a focus for certain duties and ceremonies.
LanguageData.Throne.label: presidential chair
LanguageData.ShuttleIncoming.label: vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.ShuttleLeaving.label: vertibird (leaving)
